02 · Every feature and module 1280 × 800
BetterDungeon Version 2.0.0
25 tools & modules
Everything in V2

One extension. A whole toolkit.

Every feature stays optional and configures independently from the popup. Turn on exactly what your adventure needs.

Play & controls

Command ModeSend narrative commands to the AI
Try ModeRoll for action success or failure
HotkeysTrigger quick actions with keyboard shortcuts
Input HistoryCycle through past inputs with arrow keys
Input Mode ColorsColor-code the input box by mode

Writing & automation

Markdown FormattingBold, italic, and bold italic rendering
Adventure NotesWrite and save notes per adventure
Custom DynamicRoute generations through your own model pool
Auto SeeGenerate scene images after AI responses
Text To SpeechNarrate the latest AI adventure text
Auto Enable ScriptsRe-enable scripts in the scenario editor

Creation & presets

Trigger HighlightingHighlight story card triggers in context
Story Card AnalyticsAnalyze story cards for scenario building
Story Card Modal DockDock the story card editor to the side
Plot PresetsReuse plot components
Character PresetsAI-powered scenario prefill

Ultrascripts modules

WidgetLive visual UI for script-driven displays
WebFetchConsent-gated web requests and simple search
AIAsynchronous LLM queries for scripts
ClockReliable time, time zones, and formatting
SDKVersion and configuration context for scripts
GeolocationPermission-based real-world location context
WeatherCurrent conditions and forecast lookup
NetworkConnection status and quality hints
SystemDevice, browser, display, and power context
16 features + 9 modules
